DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-03-2023 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT THE STUD'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO APPEAR AND AT INDEPENDENT MEDICAL EXAMINATION AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS, PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE PRO TEM JUDGE. MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR FURTHER HEARING TO AUGUST 17, 2023 AT 9:00 A.M. ON THE DISCOVERY CALENDAR (TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN). THIS MATTER IS CURRENTLY A NON-STIP MATTER (NO NON-STIP HEARING DATE HAS BEEN SET AT THIS TIME). IF PARTIES REACH AN AGREEMENT AS TO THIS MOTION AND WILL STIPULATE TO THE PRO TEM JUDGE SIGNING AN ORDER FOR THIS MATTER, THE PARTIES MAY SUBMIT A JOINT PROPOSED ORDER TO THE PRO TEM JUDGE AT WILLIAMCLYNN@GMAIL.COM. Off Calendar Aug-17-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE STUD's Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Appear And At Independent Medical Examination And For Monetary Sanctions. Off calendar per agreement of the parties. Judge Pro Tem: William C. Lynn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/jpt)

Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Appear And At Independent Medical Examination And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-03-2023 Continued To Aug-17-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ALBERT L. THUESEN III, Esq. of Coit Law Group (Tel: 415-787-2648) for plaintiff Richard Jukes;
Atty. BRIAN J. FINN, Esq. of Cholakian & Associates (Tel: 650-871-9544) for defendant The Stud.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT THE STUD's Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Appear And At Independent Medical Examination And For Monetary Sanctions.

Plaintiff does not stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge.

Matter is continued for further hearing to August 17, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. on the Discovery Calendar (to be heard by Judge Pro Tem William Lynn).

This matter is currently a non-stip matter (no non-stip hearing date has been set at this time). If parties reach an agreement as to this motion and will stipulate to the pro tem judge signing an order for this matter, the parties may submit a joint proposed order to the pro tem judge at williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR No. 10619, Email: raquel@transcriptlegal.com, Tel: 925-226-8222 (302/JPT)

Off Calendar Feb-24-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Defendant SERGIO FEDASZ (Tel: 510-798-4908) in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF RICHARD JUKES' Motion To Compel Further Response To Requests For Production Of Documents Against Defendant Sergio Fedasz.

The Court notes there was no timely contest by defendant of the Court's tentative ruling.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion is granted. Defendant is ordered to provide code-compliant responses within 14 days of service of notice of entry of this order.

Order signed.
